summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Field Service Route Optimization app. Major improvements achieved - all critical React DOM errors from iteration 1 have been resolved. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate) and frontend UI components render and interact perfectly.

working_endpoints: GET /api/stats (returns accurate statistics for selected city)
GET /api/technicians (returns technician list with city filtering)
GET /api/jobs (returns jobs list with status filtering)
POST /api/jobs (job creation now working - previously failing 520 error fixed)

integration_issues.issue: Map shows 401 authentication errors due to missing valid API key
integration_issues.impact: Map visualization not available, but app gracefully shows fallback message
integration_issues.note: Expected behavior - user needs to configure valid API key in Settings

passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with accurate stats (12 technicians, 50 jobs)
All sidebar navigation items work (Dashboard, Routes, Technicians, Jobs, Settings)
City/Region selector dropdown functional with 6 cities
Technicians page displays table with 12+ technicians correctly
Jobs page shows table with working tabs (All, Pending, Assigned, Unassigned)
Settings page renders with API key input field
Technician availability toggle switches work with backend integration
Add Job dialog opens with functional form fields
Data regeneration buttons work for both technicians and jobs
Tab switching works correctly on Jobs page
React rendering stable - no DOM manipulation errors
Backend API integration working for all CRUD operations
City switching updates data correctly across all pages
success_percentage: Backend: 100%, Frontend: 95% (only map visualization limited by API key)
action_item_for_main_agent: OPTIONAL: Consider adding a demo/mock mode for map visualization when no API key is configured, or provide sample API key for testing. Current implementation is acceptable as it clearly guides users to configure their own API key.
